highlights.title: Shared base values
highlights.description: Density, radius, and shadow values now start from one shared layer. Components still have their own CSS variables, but their defaults point back to these shared values instead of repeating separate numbers everywhere.

after.title: shared defaults

highlights.title: Simpler theme config
highlights.description: The theme options now describe the actual decision: who controls the root theme state, and which selector is used.

highlights.title: App-wide appearance presets
highlights.description: Apps can now adjust the broad feel of the interface from provideFrameUI instead of tuning component defaults one by one.

code.title: app.config.ts

highlights.title: Docs preview export
highlights.description: The docs header now lets users preview palettes, radius, shadow, and corner handles, then export the matching CSS and TypeScript.

sections.title: Breaking
items: Replaced theme.strategy, theme.mode, theme.attribute, and theme.className with theme.controlledBy and theme.using.

sections.title: Added
items: Added docs preview controls for palette, radius, shadow, corner handles, and CSS/TypeScript export.

sections.title: Changed
items: Density, radius, and shadow defaults now come from shared FrameUI values.
Component spacing, sizing, radius, and elevation defaults now point to those shared values.

sections.title: Fixed
items: Fixed primary Button styling so it follows theme tokens.
Fixed Input focus styling so Inputs no longer gain corner handles on focus.
